commands.narrative:
## 2026-06-08 Daily Report

**Roster:** No changes since yesterday — 152 strategies total (146 enabled, 6 disabled), identical to yesterday's snapshot.

### Headline: Pipeline Stall Day 5+ — Zero Trades, Zero Graduations

The graduation-rate-drop anomaly continues: 0 graduations and 0 trades logged today (yesterday saw 1,744 trades across 146 strategies). Bot health remains HEALTHY on all 4 diagnostic levels, but `pipeline_health.verdict = NO_GRADS` (918 s since last graduation at report time). This is the same recurring T+30 callback stall described in ai-2026-06-07-002 and ai-2026-06-06-002 — now its 5th consecutive day of occurrence.

### Top Candidates — Both STRENGTHENING, Both Blocked on Monthly Rate

No strategies clear all four promotion gates today. The two leading candidates are:

- **v9shadow-velmono-dev** (score 91.85, STRENGTHENING): n=99 (1 trade from the 100-gate), drop3=+1.658 SOL ✓, total=+3.398 SOL ✓, monthly=2.71 SOL/mo ✗ (threshold: 3.75). Outlier-stripped edge is genuine — this is the cleanest candidate in the roster. Once n hits 100, all eyes shift to the monthly rate.
- **v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono** (score 89.89, STRENGTHENING): n=102 ✓, drop3=+1.092 SOL ✓, total=+3.456 SOL ✓, monthly=2.90 SOL/mo ✗. Over the sample bar but 0.85 SOL/mo short on run rate. Both candidates will need a sustained trading run to cross the monthly gate — the pipeline stall is their enemy right now.

Every other strategy in the top-30 readiness list has drop3 ≤ 0 and therefore fails the outlier-stripped edge requirement.

### v25-bot-excl-climbing: Yesterday's Promote Recommendation is No Longer Valid

Action item ai-2026-06-07-001 (proposed yesterday) recommended promoting v25-bot-excl-climbing based on n=619, drop3=+1.065 SOL. Today's data: **n=645, drop3=−0.597 SOL**. The drop3 gate has flipped from passing to failing in one day, meaning the apparent total profit of +1.72 SOL is now driven by a handful of lottery trades. Edge flag is DECAYING. Recommend deferring ai-2026-06-07-001 until drop3 stabilizes above 0 across a 7-day window — this is not a promotable strategy at today's read.

### Kill Backlog: 6 Days Unexecuted — 39 Strategies Still Running

All kill action items from Jun 2–6 remain PROPOSED. The 39 confirmed-INVALID strategies are still consuming bot capacity:

| Item | Targets | Age |
|---|---|---|
| ai-2026-06-02-002 | v35 family (2), v37 family (2), v43 trailSL family (4), v44 climb twins (2) = 11 | Day 6 |
| ai-2026-06-02-003 | v14-sumabs-shadow, v10-best-double, v20 dd/sl, v5-velmono, v42-be10, v15-vel5-10, v39 family (5), v40-top5-tight = 13 | Day 6 |
| ai-2026-06-02-004 | v41-holders family (5), v42-breakeven family (4) = 9 | Day 6 |
| ai-2026-06-03-001 | v37-creator-clean, v40-vel-band = 2 | Day 5 |
| ai-2026-06-05-001 | v32/v28/v33/v34 climbing-1s cluster = 4 | Day 3 |
| ai-2026-06-06-001 | v9shadow-vel20-top5 = 1 | Day 2 |

Worst bleeder still running: v35-vel2050-holders10 (total=−12.03 SOL, drop3=−14.62 SOL). **The single most important operator action is executing these kills via a single strategy-commands.json push.**

### Panel 7 Walk-Forward Notes

Two filter families flag OVERFIT and must not be used in new strategy combos:
- `holders >= 50 (backfill)`: OVERFIT (+8.0 pp degradation)
- `holders >= 100 (backfill)`: OVERFIT (+11.3 pp degradation)
- `top5 > 15%`: OVERFIT (+11.8 pp — do not use inverted top5 as a positive signal)

Notable ROBUST exception: `holders >= 250 (backfill)` passes walk-forward (0.54 pp degradation) and sits #2 on the best-combos leaderboard (opt_avg_ret=24.25%, n=396). The create action items for v50-holders250-shadow and v50-gini04-climbing remain un-executed.

### Cross-Day Patterns

The kill backlog has persisted across 6 consecutive daily reports — it is a human action item, not a code problem. The pipeline stall is recurring for the 5th day (Jun 4–8) and remains unresolved. The two v9shadow candidates have posted STRENGTHENING scores every day this week. Edge decay anomalies (45 medium-severity) are concentrated in the kill-candidate cohorts — reinforcing the kill case rather than introducing new concerns.

### Operator Next Step

Execute the 39-strategy kill block (ai-2026-06-02-002 through ai-2026-06-06-001) in a single `strategy-commands.json` push. All 39 are confirmed INVALID; none warrant further data collection. After the kill, the bot roster drops from 146 to 107 active strategies — sharper signal, less capacity waste.

v25-bot-excl-climbing drop3 flipped from +1.065 (n=619, Jun 7) to −0.597 (n=645, Jun 8). DECAYING. Promote action item ai-2026-06-07-001 is no longer valid.
45 medium-severity edge_decay anomalies active — concentrated in kill-candidate cohorts (v43 trailSL, v35, v40, v47, v52 families).

v25-bot-excl-climbing reversed from passing to failing drop3 gate in one day — monitor top3-contribution drift.
